sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner's method.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_divider: Combinational fixed-point divider that computes numerator divided by denominator with fractional scaling.
sub_modules.nr_newton_update: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block with derivative-zero hold behavior.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block that checks whether the polynomial magnitude at the candidate root is within tolerance.
